name: Failed-Fudge Bavarian Cream
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Unflavored gelatin (2 envelopes or 1/2 ounce)
recipeInstructions:
If the fudge doesn't harden and is very, very runny, turn it into a Bavarian Cream.
1. Take half a cup of the runny fudge and sprinkle gelatin over it. Allow it to sit until the gelatin softens and swells.
2. Dissolve the gelatin completely by microwaving on medium (50%) for 15 to 30 seconds, or by placing it over hot water.
3. Mix the warmed fudge back into the rest of the fudge and let cool to room temperature.
4. Beat egg whites until frothy, adding cream of tartar as they become frothy. Continue beating until stiff peaks form, then fold into the fudge mixture.
5. Beat the heavy cream in a chilled bowl using chilled beaters until it is stiffened but not thick— it should hold soft peaks—and fold into the fudge mixture.
6. Pour the mixture into a 6-cup mold and chill until ready to serve.
